$description: Landing-Dashboard fuer das i3X Plant Cockpit. Wird vom Generator (packages/exporters/src/grafana-dashboards.ts) zu einem Grafana-JSON expandiert + Branding interpoliert. Die machine-Tiles repeat per $machine_id-Variable — neue Maschine erscheint zero-touch.
title: Plant Cockpit

variables.name: machine_id
variables.query: SELECT DISTINCT machine_id FROM bde_data ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Plant OEE
panels.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(quality * performance * availability * 100)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM oee_hourly_v5 WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '8 hours'

panels.title: Active Machines
panels.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT machine_id) AS value FROM bde_data WHERE cycle_timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' AND machine_status = 1
panels.subquery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT machine_id) AS total FROM bde_data WHERE cycle_timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Good Parts (8h)
panels.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(good_parts), 0) AS value FROM bde_data WHERE cycle_timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '8 hours'

panels.title: Scrap Parts (8h)
panels.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(scrap_parts), 0) AS value FROM bde_data WHERE cycle_timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '8 hours'

queries.status: SELECT machine_status, machine_status_text FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' ORDER BY cycle_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1
queries.oee: SELECT ROUND((quality * performance * availability * 100)::numeric, 1) FROM oee_hourly_v5 WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' ORDER BY bucket DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparkline: SELECT bucket AS time, (quality*performance*availability*100) AS oee FROM oee_hourly_v5 WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY bucket
queries.good: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(good_parts),0) FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND cycle_timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '8 hours'
queries.scrap: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(scrap_parts),0) FROM bde_data WHERE machine_id='$machine_id' AND cycle_timestamp > NOW() - INTERVAL '8 hours'

panels.title: OEE Ranking
panels.query: SELECT machine_id, ROUND((AVG(quality * performance * availability) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS oee_pct FROM oee_hourly_v5 WHERE bucket > NOW() - INTERVAL '8 hours' GROUP BY machine_id ORDER BY oee_pct ASC LIMIT 5
